title: 10 best herbal teas for ulcerative colitis
description: Zingiber officinale, also known as ginger, teas helps with ulcerative colitis because of its anti-inflammatory properties. The active compounds present in ginger, such as gingerol and shogaol, have been shown to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with ulcerative colitis. Additionally, ginger has been found to have antioxidant properties, which can help protect the gut from oxidative stress and promote healing.
